sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ مُحَمَّدٌ السَّلَطَةَ مَعَ كُلِّ وَجْبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Muhammed jede salatu uz svaki obrok.
sentences.translationEn: Muhammad eats salad with every meal.

sentences.translation: Dodaje na nju maslinovo ulje i limun.
sentences.translationEn: He adds olive oil and lemon on it.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ إِنَّ السَّلَطَةَ تُسَاعِدُهُ عَلَى الشُّعُورِ بِالشَّبَعِ.
sentences.translation: Kaže da mu salata pomaže da se osjeća sito.
sentences.translationEn: He says that salad helps him feel full.

sentences.translation: Njegova težina je odgovarajuća i zdravlje odlično.
sentences.translationEn: His weight is suitable and his health is excellent.
